title: GLSL Panorama Shaders
description: This mod allows resource packs to add GLSL shaders for the title screen panorama
body:
# GLSL Panorama Shaders

This mod allows resource packs to add shaders for the title screen panorama!  
This mod requires **Fabric API**, you can configure the panorama shaders (change quality, disable/enable) using the "settings" button in **Mod Menu** or by pressing **F5** while on the title screen.  
The shaders are loaded from resource packs, for more info on how to make one see the wiki page. You got questions or need help? Visit my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/kdwNmS3cBE).

![Default Panorama Shader](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/kqc8wQyk/images/e69154506ba26912f4d72ae6b3784f47b17610b7.png)

The default, build-in shader "Neonwave Sunrise" by **mrange**, licensed under CC0.   
See original here: [Shadertoy](https://www.shadertoy.com/view/7dyyRy).
